title: Kāramadai Heat Wave
lead: Kāramadai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kāramadai has resulted in a critical level of heat stress, with a CDD of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 43%, and the wind speed is 8.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
